title: LCL Lances
wikitext:
[]: LCL Lances?             Quote Post by Duskbyday » Tue Aug 18, 2009 6:51 am Sorry if this has been answered I couldn't see if it had, I was just curious, in EOE when Shinji rejects instrumentality all the MP eva's lances turn into LCL.....how does that work? Are Lances alive or what. I just didn't have a clue. Answers?

[]:             Quote Post by Zaque » Tue Aug 18, 2009 7:47 am yes, check the notes section

[]:             Quote Post by Duskbyday » Tue Aug 18, 2009 8:04 am Thnk you!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Aug 18, 2009 6:45 pm Zaque wrote: yes, check the notes section

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Wed Aug 19, 2009 12:10 am The fake lances were copies of a lifeform that was created by the FAR so it can be inferred that the original and probably it's copies were made from lcl.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Aug 19, 2009 2:01 pm Well, not LCL, that's Lilith's menstrual baby-making juice. The original was probably made of PWM. The fake Lances could be PWM as well, because I honestly don't remember them melting or anything.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Sat Aug 22, 2009 1:53 pm Well lets put it this way, When Eva 00 threw it, it closed itself, not a switch for 00 to press or anything, the spear responded to the situation. When it came into contact with the AT field, it used its double helix formation to an advantage and started spraying out what was likely air trapped inside the hollow form when it closed itself to aide in piercing the ATF like a drill. The Lance seems to want to help whoever possesses it with a will of it's own. Thus it is considered a living being and could likely be cloned however slowly like the Evas were.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Aug 22, 2009 4:45 pm Yea, we're aware. The Lances are organisms with a will.
